explanation: Number of MTC (Metropolitan Transport Corporation) bus routes passing through or originating in this constituency. More routes generally means better public transport access.
source_name: Tamil Nadu Transport Dept. Open Data

explanation: Total new vehicles registered in this district in 2023. Rising registrations can indicate economic growth but also suggest road congestion pressure.
source_name: TN Transport Dept. — Vehicle Registration Data

explanation: Annual average PM2.5 particulate pollution level. The WHO guideline is 15 µg/m³. Levels above 55 are considered unhealthy for sensitive groups.
Number of government schools in this constituency. This includes primary, middle, and high schools run by the state or Corporation of Chennai.
Number of TNSTC bus routes passing through this constituency. Coimbatore has a growing suburban bus network.
source_name: Tamil Nadu Transport Dept. Open Data

explanation: Total new vehicles registered in Coimbatore district in 2023. Coimbatore has one of the highest vehicle growth rates in TN due to its industrial economy.
source_name: TN Transport Dept. — Vehicle Registration Data

explanation: Annual average PM2.5 level. Coimbatore's air quality is relatively better than Chennai but has been worsening due to industrial activity.
Number of registered industries in Coimbatore district. Coimbatore is known as the 'Manchester of South India' for its textile and manufacturing base.
Number of TNSTC/Madurai city bus routes serving this constituency. Madurai East has limited bus connectivity compared to West.
source_name: Tamil Nadu Transport Dept. Open Data

explanation: Total new vehicles registered in Madurai district in 2023. The figure reflects continued two-wheeler dominance in this constituency.
source_name: TN Transport Dept. — Vehicle Registration Data

explanation: Number of government hospitals (primary health centres and above) in Madurai district. Access to public healthcare is a key civic indicator.
Number of TNSTC bus routes serving Trichy West. Trichy has a well-connected intercity and local bus network.
source_name: Tamil Nadu Transport Dept. Open Data

explanation: Total new vehicles registered in Tiruchirappalli district in 2023.
source_name: TN Transport Dept. — Vehicle Registration Data

explanation: Annual average PM2.5 pollution level. Trichy's air quality is better than major metros, though industrial zones push it above WHO guidelines.
trend_note: Near same level as last year

explanation: Number of TNSTC bus routes serving Salem West constituency. Rural-urban connectivity has been a long-standing concern in this area.
source_name: Tamil Nadu Transport Dept. Open Data

explanation: Total new vehicle registrations in Salem district in 2023. Two-wheelers account for the majority of new registrations.
source_name: TN Transport Dept. — Vehicle Registration Data

explanation: Total area under cultivation in Salem district. Salem is an important agricultural zone with mango and paddy farming.
trend_note: Declined 3% from 2021 due to land-use change
